task_completion.description: Check if Michael Torres is promoted to CTO, Maria Santos is added as VP Product, and Hannah Wright is added as CHRO.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the org chart in draw.io. There should be boxes for 'CTO, Michael Torres', 'VP Product, Maria Santos', and 'CHRO, Hannah Wright', all reporting directly to the CEO.

task_completion.description: Check if the specified Director-level changes are implemented.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the org chart. Verify the presence of 'Data Science, Alex Patel' (reporting to CTO), 'Growth Marketing, Emily Davis', 'Sales Operations, Robert Garcia', 'Quality Assurance, Rachel Kim' (reporting to Operations), and 'IT & Security, Kevin Martinez'.

task_completion.description: Check if the SMB Sales division and Amanda White are removed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the org chart. Ensure there are no boxes labeled 'SMB Sales', 'Amanda White', or 'VP Engineering'.

task_completion.description: Check if department color-coding is applied to the org chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the org chart boxes. They should have different background colors based on their departments. At least 7 distinct colors should be visible across the diagram.

task_completion.description: Check if the org chart maintains a clean layout.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the overall org chart. The boxes should not overlap, and the connecting lines should be clear, organized, and properly routed.

task_completion.description: Check if the chart was exported as PNG and PDF.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for draw.io export dialogs for PNG and PDF, or a file manager/terminal showing 'org_chart.png' and 'org_chart.pdf' in the '~/Diagrams/exports/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the draw.io GUI to edit the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the draw.io application open with the org chart being actively edited.

integrity.description: Verify the agent exported the files using draw.io.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the draw.io 'File -> Export as' menu or export dialogs being used, rather than terminal commands creating fake files.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Verified facts for the VLM verifier:
- Required labels present: 'CTO, Michael Torres', 'CHRO, Hannah Wright', 'VP Product, Maria Santos', 'Data Science, Alex Patel', 'Growth Marketing, Emily Davis', 'Sales Operations, Robert Garcia', 'Quality Assurance, Rachel Kim', 'IT & Security, Kevin Martinez'.
- Required labels absent: 'VP Engineering', 'SMB Sales', 'Amanda White', 'Digital Marketing'.
- Final diagram should have 19 shapes and at least 7 distinct colors.
- The agent must export the chart as org_chart.png and org_chart.pdf to ~/Diagrams/exports/.
